issues_found: Source is a publication listing/index page, not the actual Financial System Survey document with results
Source body contains only metadata and a one-sentence description — no actual survey findings, respondent data, or risk assessments
Record correctly identifies lack of substantive content but still submitted for review
Cannot support macro catalyst research without actual survey data (e.g., respondent percentages, risk severity ratings)
Published May 8, 2025 — approximately 10 months before TODAY, making the thin content even more problematic
human_review_reason: Source is a container/listing page capturing only metadata. The actual 2025 Financial System Survey PDF or detailed results page with respondent views and quantitative findings is not present. This record has no research value as-is.

corrected_fields.summary: The Bank of Canada published a summary of its 2025 Financial System Survey on May 8, 2025, based on a survey conducted February 10–28. However, this source record captures only the publication metadata and brief description, not the actual survey results, respondent data, or risk assessments. The full survey content must be obtained separately.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: Financial System Surveys can capture professional views on systemic risks and market vulnerabilities, but this record contains only metadata. It cannot inform macro catalyst analysis or investment decisions without the actual survey findings.
